description: Working on multiple client projects — all React Native, all started from scratch. Projects span fintech, retail, and enterprise verticals. Using Expo for deployment to App Store and Google Play. Building reusable white-label component systems and enforcing strict TypeScript patterns across teams.
highlights: Multiple production apps shipped to App Store and Google Play
Built white-label component library for rapid product iteration
Latest libraries and architecture patterns throughout

description: Developed Tiexo, an NFT data aggregator on the Solana blockchain. Owned the full technical scope — from blockchain parsing to the marketplace REST API and the Next.js front end.
highlights: Implemented full blockchain parsing, transaction building and publishing
Built the REST API for marketplace modules (MongoDB + PostgreSQL)
Delivered both the aggregator and marketplace from scratch

description: Built Moonlet, a non-custodial cryptocurrency wallet supporting multiple blockchains. Delivered the React Native app for iOS, Android, and a Chrome extension, plus a highly scalable backend for remote screen composition.
highlights: Non-custodial wallet with multi-blockchain support (Solana, Zilliqa, Ethereum, Near)
Built React Native app for iOS, Android and Chrome Extension
Scalable backend for on-the-fly remote screen rendering via network responses

description: Developed Soundmix, a live video streaming app for DJs. Led the mobile and backend team end-to-end — from recruiting and onboarding to implementing CI/CD pipelines.
highlights: Led mobile and backend team — recruiting, training, architecture decisions
Spearheaded the switch from manual pipelines to CI/CD
Delivered live video streaming for mobile DJs

role: iOS Developer · Team Lead · Project Manager
description: Ten years building iOS applications as a freelancer and contractor. Worked across a wide range of clients and projects — from consumer apps to enterprise tools. Progressively moved into team lead and project management roles, overseeing delivery from spec to App Store.
highlights: iOS developer from the early App Store era
Grew into team lead and project manager roles over time
Wide range of clients: consumer, media, and enterprise verticals
